description_long: This is a modern, front-loading washing machine with a sleek, metallic gray exterior and a large circular door on the front. The control panel is positioned at the top front, featuring a digital display, several buttons, and a rotary dial for selecting wash cycles. The machine has a robust, boxy form with smooth, flat side panels and a solid, flat top surface suitable for placing small items. A small, rectangular label or sticker is visible on the front, likely indicating energy efficiency or usage instructions. The door is opaque and slightly protrudes from the main body, with a subtle handle integrated into its edge. The overall design is minimalist and functional, typical of contemporary household appliances found in urban environments.
description: A sleek, metallic gray front-loading washing machine with a digital control panel and a large circular door. The design is modern and functional, with smooth surfaces and minimalistic detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large circular door, digital control panel with buttons and dial, and a small label on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the flat, featureless metallic panel and the slight protrusion of the door and control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid back panel with minimal detailing and a small vent or grille at the bottom.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a flat metallic surface and the door/control panel edges visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the machine, featuring a digital display on the left, a row of rectangular buttons below the display, and a large rotary dial on the right. There are also small labeled indicators and a few additional buttons to the right of the dial.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular door made of opaque material with a subtle integrated handle on the edge.
